title: [MTR4] Slumbering Tartarus's MTR4 Vehicles
description: This is a resource pack that adds all my trains for MTR version 4.0.3.
body:
This pack has all the trains I made for MTR4.

This pack REQUIRES Minecraft Transit Railway version 4.0.3. Any previous versions of MTR will not be supported.

As of 1.0 these are the packs I've added:
_Trains_
![Startrain a40](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67eae39b04dd4c7eaf07870b0a929185285973d7.png)

Yeah this pack needs improvements...
